review_text:
Excellent stay, everything you need around you on Bribie, across from the water, super clean and lovely people running the park. We have been around Australia and we had a  pleasuring stay which sometimes is rare. You always come back. Thankyou and appreciated
For my wifes necklace, best efforts and didn't give up, the wife hasn't stopped thanking you both.
Thanks heaps appreciated.

Beautiful location absolutely,  shops and bowling club nearby,  amenities great.
The only thing I can say ( being bit petty ) is that our site was hard to get small caravan into being on a corner  that had two trees to miss if other  vans were across,but that's one of the hardest ones apparently .  The roundabout is right there at this site , But it's only mainly evening traffic coming home from work if your sitting outside for a bit.
There are Plenty of noisy lorikeets  cockatoos , bats, in the evening ,and is actually beautiful to watch them fly around for an hour or so.
The sunsets are spectacular from many sites .  Everything is in walking distance ,and must say  definitely worth coming back to.
Camp kitchen is super clean and big area.  It's very relaxing and worth visiting.
We stay at Bongaree every year in the cabins, great location
Great location overlooking Pumacie Passage.  Excellent modern and clean amenities with the Bongaree Bowling next door you can't go wrong.
Just had a look around, extremely busy
Great place!
Great place to stay, lovely and clean, position wise fantastic.
Excellent camping spot! Best on the island!

We have been on and off bongaree for nearly 2 years  the site is very well maintained   toilets and showers are so clean  and can't fault the staff very helpful and friendly  the manager Derek is a great guy helpful and very friendly  I rate this site 100percent  well done bongaree
Great caravan park- friendly staff, clean amenities and great camping kitchen. Can't knock the incredible location opposite the pumistone passage either.

What's not to like. 👍
Such good accommodation rates, we stayed 3 nights for a total of $425. Clean, well maintained cabins. View to die for.
Close to Bongaree Bowls club.
Best feature.....VERY RELAXING.
Caravan sites 110 and 111, 1 star when avocado tree is in bloom and flying foxes are shitting all over your caravan and awning. Rest of caravan Park very good,  great views
Estava fechado  e no maps  dizia que estava aberto

Cottage is nice and clean, however located at back with view of bowling lane and back street. On a Corner of busy road where campers in and and out.  No where for children to play safely. Wouldnt recommend for a family with young kids... Too stressful! Staff lovely though
Fantastic location

Tidy joint, the kitchen and toilet area are pretty clean.
Heads up if you're on a tent going to toilet is a bit of a walk, but for caravans pretty close.
Also they have old bunkers, pretty interesting history. Great view of the ocean too.
Awesome park
Nice place with clean amenities and kitchen. Coin operated washing machines and dryers,close to the bowling club, which has great food and a short walk to the local shops.
Always an excellent park

I understand as a business you need to take deposits but when I try and move the booking to another date due to my family being sick and I lose my deposit, it doesn’t seem fair. I wanted to move the booking to another week. You said no and I will lose my deposit. Unfortunately I will not come at another time.
Great caravan park. Great location & good price
A great caravan park situated right on Pumicestone passage. Fantastic amenities and friendly staff make a stay here enjoyable.
The caravan park was clean and well looked after. Beautiful views of the sunset from across the road. Close to many places to eat.

Amazing little spot- just across the road from the water. Facilities are very clean and in great condition. Kids loved scooting and riding around. Only con is no pool and have to walk around to the gates to enter and exit.

Cabins are on the older side,
Caravan park is definitely not for young kids unless you plan on going on an adventure each day.older kids it fine as they can walk across the road to fish, ride along the paths.

Location to everything is really convenient. You need to try the 1kg donut up at Kenilworth bakery.

Heaps of people were using the kitchen and laundry facilities etc.

if you get woken up birds at night, this place is not for you.
Same as 2 years ago, except prices are higher.

Older park. Right on the passage on Bribie Island. The sunsets & position to clubs & shops 5 star. Staff friendly.  Facilities great. Not expensive.  Just book sit on ya deck enjoy the view & sound of wild life.

Great convenient location.  Staff friendly and helpful.  We stayed in a cabin and it was just lovely.  Only things that didn't impress were no wifi available to guests (yes, it's true!!) and the thin and harsh toilet paper - maybe bring your own.  Plenty of places to walk to for meals.  Bowls club is very close by.

1st nite in new motorhome
Awesome location. Great sites.
Great value for money! Right on the beach. Surprisingly quiet camping ground and around the area too. Super clean amenities. Water view campsites, what more could you want!
I love it here, come every year
Great caravan park and cheap rates
First test weekend away with new to us van. Was lovely spot and looking to go back in the new year. Trip was in august 24
A lovely spot, surprisingly quiet for its location on a main thoroughfare. Very clean and comfortable amenities, good sized sites. Easy walking to shops and restaurants, swimming and fishing.
Location great cabin a bit dated room for improvement

This is mine and my partner's favourite place to go for a little holiday, our cabin has a very good price per night and overlooks the water, sitting on the veranda is quite peaceful when you were having a bourbon

A great caravan park with good size sites.   Quite beach across the road, via a pedestrian crossing, perfect for families. Added bonus right next door to the bowls club and cafes just up the road. Very nice.

I love this spot. One of my favourite places to swag or take the caravan. Right opposite the passage. Great for water sports including paddle boarding, jet skiiing, boating or just sitting in the water. Dolphins are often around and dugongs.
I enjoyed my stay
Beautiful place to stay and go.

Cabin 1 is on the top of the hill, shielded from traffic noise but gets all the breeze. It’s a bare basics open plan habitat, but it’s got everything you need. Kitchen, tv, bathroom, 1 dbl 1 single & a roll-out trundle bed. The star is the balcony - generous in size. A 2 minute walk to the beach. Perfect location!
Nice caravan park

Quiet, friendly, clean amenities & convenient location.
Would satisfy most campers.
Great spot opposite Pumicestone Passage. Excellent walking and cycling opportunities.
Have found this park too be an excellent park with excellent facilities and surrounds

Cabins are Very Clean and well located.

Walking distance from 2 different lots of shops including an IGA and the best Fish and chips

RSL club a must, pay the $10 membership you will get it back in specials

COLD,......But the air-conditioning is great

Close to shops, take aways, restaurants and best of all, right across the road from the beach & the waters of Pumicestone passage. I can recommend a visit to the Bakery directly across the road. The park Staff were friendly, helpful & welcoming. On arrival they pointed out the facilities & showed us to our cabin. The 2 bedroom cabin was clean, comfortable & perfect for our 4 day stop here - also very quiet. The park is conveniently located 20 m from the bowls club with the RSL Club a short walk which can be via the beach or well tended footpaths - both places had special offer meal nights (Wed was steak night). Both the Bowls club & the RSL were very welcoming to visitors. Would definitely recommend when next visiting Bribie Island - we even came across some wild Kangaroos on one of our walks.

We booked a caravan site 2mths ago which we had to cancel, rang to explain why and we rebooked for following weekend... The following weekend was pouring rain so we rang for a chat and was told everything would be fine but they would hold on to our deposit which was fine with us because we wanted to check out Bribie island .... Rang a few days ago to reorganise a few days away and was told sorry, you have lost your deposit ! It certainly would help if you were upfront about these kind of things.... Look out Tallebudgera creek tourist Park, here we come in a fortnight....
Awesome caravan park, close to everything
We had the most wonderful holiday. Rebecca is a special asset to the moreton bay council trailer park team. Keep up the great work.
Great location. Minimal rug rats. Better value than the Big4 across the water.
Great to see caravans park still around .we need more of them

A beautiful little park, with lots of space between sites. The amenities were all of a great standard and clean.  Staff were very friendly and helpful.
Great position with walk paths going in both directions, along the river.
Thanks for the chat we had, we’ll be back.
We had our own caravan.

Great caravan Park close to Bowls club, Heaps of room between caravans. Reception is very informative and helpful. Very good area to stay with great waterfront views close by. Shops very close by and the IGA very handy.

Nice little, cost-effective campground.
Close to roads, hence constant traffic noise.
Great caravan and camping site across the road from the water. Good level sites with slabs.
One of the best Camping  Grounds on the Sunshine Coast  only added feature I would love would be a fire pit and dogs to be allowed just saying :)
Friendly staff at reception and in grounds. Clean tidy sites. Quiet location,

Paid for a site next to the friends we were travelling with.but because we didn't bring our camper trailer and bought a swag instead we had to camp on a tent site . Original plans were to bring our van which apparently was to big for there sites. Not sure what damage our swag would of done to the slab. No discount on price either for us relocating to there tent sites
Never to return.
Stayed in my caravan

Horrible staff, no help at all. Would not go back. Located across the road from a boat ramp but nowhere to wash boat or flush motor at the park. Staff advised washing facilities over the road, they weren’t. Staff sneak around, was told they had body worn cameras, in a caravan park for goodness sake. Won’t engage until they catch you out on a fine print breach. Manager will not listen, kept talking over me when I tried to explain the situation, always right and it’s all in the fine print.

Great park |Everything you need close by shops clubs restaurants parks and best if all the beach across the road |Loved it it's our new favourite park |Can't wait to go back |Not alot at the actual park for kids but we didn't mind |As much as we love kids we went to the park to get a break from kids lol

Great caravan park - right on the Pumicestone passage.
Photo is sunset over the water towards the mainland.
Our time at Bongaree Caravan Park, is always the best time spent , chillaxing and enjoying quite time on Bribie with all the comforts of home .....🌈😎

Ein sehr schön, kleiner und übersichtlicher Camping. Wir haben schöne 3 Nachte hier verbracht und kämen gerne wieder.
Waschen 4$ Tumbler 4$ muss mit Münzen gezahlt werden.
Was in my van have been back and going  again
Its worth the visit and stay! Love how spacious it is, and how there is a nearby water for the view. Ambiance is also a plus!
Only visiting family,looks like camping very close to each other.

Amazing environment to be in. Family friendly close to everything.
Staff are realy nice, professional and helpful, they work realy hard keeping the place looking great.
The kitchen is massive, awesome laundry and showers too.

Powered sites with water and decent slabs.
Wild life is abundant and they have a nice playground for the kids.

The office has a kiosk with Bait, Ice 🧊, Milk, Ice creams and cold drinks.

Can't wait to come back
Gorgeous little caravan park within walking distance from the beach (closest jetty pictured), shops, restaurants. Very clean amenities!!! Great price too.
Greatest caravan park on Bribie Island

The caravan park is situated in a great spot opposite pumicestone passage, a beautiful inlet where you can swim and do all water activites. A short walk to restaurants/cafes and other areas of interest. Good, clean amenities. Some sites have hood views of the water. You won't be there much as there's so much to do and see around this area. Would definately return.
It was a very friendly place  and  it was very relaxing  holiday. We are going to go back there next year for another holiday

Central to everything at Bribie.  Bowls Club next door. Courtesy Bus to RSL. Shops, cafes, library, museum and boat ramp all walking distance.  Park your car and forget it. Wide concrete slabs for vans. New amenities and flat sites for vans,  camper vans and tents.
Large sites on concrete pad directly across from pumicestone passage .suitable haz great views and access to the beach and boat ramp close to shops as well
Fantastic park, great staff, beautiful amenities & perfect location

Amazing location! Opposite the front beach and close to shops amd restaurants. The cabins are quite outdated but clean. I was surprised/disappointed that there was no wifi and ended up having to spend $20 to get extra data on my phone plan as a result.
Great location. Friendly and helpful staff
Good place
Great place for a holiday
I stayed at a powered camping site here - excellent value, modern/clean/comfortable facilities. Great location & views. Only good things to say!
Great spot, near beach, shops, cafe

We love this caravan park across the road is the beach lovely walking track we love to walk & easy flat walk to the shops etc ....
The amenities are spotless as is the camp kitchen
We will be back 😀😀
Great job
Wonderful place to visit and stay
Great location right next to the water. Lovely surrounds. Friendly staff.
Camping très propre, accueillant ! Vous avez tous les équipements nécessaire, propre et neuf ! La mer est juste en face, c’est très bien 👍

The best caravan park in Bribie Island. Lovely park in fantastic location right in Bribie with wonderful walk way along Bay, parkland and beautiful sunsets.
Facilities excellent and spotlessly clean and very fair tariff $37 p.n.  Highly recommend!
